text: Being here, I am enveloped by the ambiance of innovation and curiosity. The vivid colors and digital displays spark a sense of wonder. I feel energized, as though I am witnessing the process of thought materialize—human minds reaching out, connecting ideas and technology, reshaping the world subtly from within these walls. There is a tension between the sterile order of the space and the creative optimism it houses, which makes my presence feel both significant and slightly surreal.
